headlines.summary: Since March, Ukraine has systematically dismantled Russia’s refining system, driving crude processing to its lowest level in 21 years and forcing Moscow to ban exports of gasoline, jet fuel and diesel. headlines.title: U.S. Strikes Iran Again as Brent Slips Despite Escalating Conflict
headlines.summary: The oil market is treating another US-Iran escalation as background noise. The U.S. launched another wave of strikes against Iran on Wednesday, expanding attacks on military targets along the country's southern coast. Brent crude barely flinched. headlines.title: World-First Floating Wind Technology to Help Power Oil Rigs
headlines.summary: It’s not often that wind power and oil and gas are mentioned in the same breath. headlines.title: U.S. Crude Inventories Fall 1.7 Million Barrels As Iran Tensions Rattle Markets
